holdings.infoBox: GPIX is an equity ETF with a total of 497 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.98%, Apple at 6.74%, Alphabet at 4.46%, Microsoft at 4.39%, and Amazon.com at 3.74%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs S&P 500 Premium Income ETF (GPIX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF, primarily investing in stocks of companies in the S&P 500. Combining equity investments with a call strategy, the fund seeks to generate stable income while offering potential for capital growth  GPIX was launched on Oct 24, 2023 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
